## 📋 Today's Overview
*May 04, 2026*

### Superconductivity (12 new today)

1.  The study focuses on **hybrid superconducting-metallic bilayers**, employing **strong-coupling methods** to address/solve **the challenge of demonstrating unambiguous performance gains from metallic reservoirs in boosting superconducting stiffness**.
2.  The study focuses on **superconducting electronics**, employing **a cryogenic widefield NV-diamond magnetic microscope** to address/solve **the need for rapid, micrometer-scale imaging of magnetic flux trapping**.
3.  The study focuses on **magnons in a YIG microstructure**, employing **strong-coupling experiments with a superconducting resonator** to address/solve **the challenge of achieving strong coupling in on-chip, microscopic device geometries**.
4.  The study focuses on **FeSe**, employing **nematic domain control** to address/solve **the limitation of static inversion asymmetry in superconducting diodes, enabling a programmable superconducting diode effect**.
5.  The study focuses on **the LaAlO₃/SrTiO₃ (LAO/STO) heterointerface**, employing **atomic force microscopy for local probing** to address/solve **the enigmatic nature of superconductivity and puzzling transport phenomena in confined oxide interfaces**.
6.  The study focuses on **quasi-one-dimensional superconducting aluminum two-width structures**, employing **measurements of critical currents as functions of temperature and magnetic field** to address/solve **the observation of unusual critical current behavior in structures with different critical temperatures**.
7.  The study focuses on **a superconducting asymmetric aluminum ring**, employing **measurements of ac voltage rectification** to address/solve **the mechanism of rectification due to the shift of critical current maxima relative to zero magnetic flux**.
8.  The study focuses on **wide and narrow quasi-one-dimensional superconducting aluminum structures**, employing **measurements of critical temperatures and critical currents in zero magnetic field** to address/solve **the finding that narrower structures have lower critical temperatures and current densities**.
9.  The study focuses on **rhombohedral graphene moire superlattices**, employing **in-plane magnetic fields** to address/solve **the relationship between Chern number reversal and the emergence of unconventional superconducting phases**.
10. The study focuses on **a disordered helical superconducting edge in a 2D topological insulator**, employing **bosonization and renormalization-group analysis** to address/solve **how disorder and Zeeman field modify charge, spin, and superconducting pair correlations**.
11. The study focuses on **Zn-doped CeCoIn₅**, employing **scanning SQUID microscopy to measure local penetration depth and T_c** to address/solve **the identification of a magnetic quantum critical point embedded within the superconducting state**.
12. The study focuses on **a superconductor/insulating magnet system**, employing **experimental and theoretical analysis** to address/solve **the conversion of uniform ferromagnetic resonance into perpendicular standing spin waves via a diffusive superconductor**.

### spin glass (1 new today)

1. The study focuses on systems with synergistic interactions, employing a spreading model to address the question of whether extended criticality can arise outside of quenched disorder or frustration, showing that synergistic interactions provide a distinct route to non-conventional critical phenomena.

---

## 📄 Paper Details

### Superconductivity

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Enhancement of superconducting stiffness in hybrid superconducting-metallic bilayers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28187v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Boosting superconductivity by metallic reservoirs is the essence of Kivelson's bilayer proposal. One layer provides pairing to the electrons, while the weakly coupled metal provides additional phase coherence to those pairs by mediating extended-range pair-pair coupling. Demonstrating significant and unambiguous performance gains with strong-coupling methods for such set-ups had been difficult. In the present work, we study these systems doped away from half-filling, corresponding to a partially spin-polarized 1D Anderson- or Kondo-lattice. We show that this breaks the coexistence of dominant superconducting and density-density correlations decisively in favour or the former. Consequently, we provide evidence that in this doped regime, superconducting near-long-range order is not precluded by a small charge-gap in the thermodynamic limit, as we have recently shown to be the case at half-filling [JE Ebot $et$ $al.$, arXiv:2602.11153 [cond-mat.supr-con]]. We study the complex manner in which the enhancement of superconductivity in the pairing layer depends on the parameters of the metal, and especially that both pairing-limited and stiffness-limited regimes may appear in these systems. In addition to superconducting bilayers, our results are relevant, via a particle-hole transformation, for heavy-fermion Kondo-lattice materials in magnetic fields, as we provide previously lacking insight on the competition between antiferromagnetic and easy-plane magnetism, as well as a route for comprehensive indirect tests of Kivelson's bilayer proposal well beyond previous capabilities.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>通过金属库提升超导性是Kivelson双层提案的核心。一层为电子提供配对，而弱耦合金属通过介导长程对-对耦合，为这些库珀对提供额外的相位相干性。此前，利用强耦合方法在此类体系中展示显著且明确的性能提升一直颇具挑战。在本工作中，我们研究了偏离半填充掺杂的这些系统，对应于部分自旋极化的一维安德森或近藤晶格。我们证明，这打破了主导性超导关联与密度-密度关联的共存状态，并决定性地使前者占据优势。因此，我们提供证据表明，在此掺杂区间内，超导近长程有序并未被热力学极限下的微小电荷能隙所阻碍——我们近期已证明在半填充情况下正是如此[JE Ebot等人，arXiv:2602.11153 [cond-mat.supr-con]]。我们研究了配对层中超导增强以复杂方式依赖于金属参数，特别是这两个系统中可能出现配对受限和刚度受限两种状态。除超导双层外，通过粒子-空穴变换，我们的结果也与磁场中的重费米子近藤晶格材料相关，因为我们提供了此前缺乏的关于反铁磁与易面磁性之间竞争的见解，以及一条远超以往能力的、对Kivelson双层提案进行全面间接测试的途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | J. E. Ebot et al. |
| 2 | **[Flux-trapping characterization for superconducting electronics using a cryogenic widefield N-$V$ diamond microscope](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.01906v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Magnetic flux trapping is a significant hurdle limiting the reliability and scalability of superconducting electronics, yet tools for imaging flux vortices remain slow or insensitive. We present a cryogenic widefield NV-diamond magnetic microscope capable of rapid, micrometer-scale imaging of flux trapping in superconducting devices. Using this technique, we measure vortex expulsion fields in Nb thin films and patterned strips, revealing a crossover in expulsion behavior between $10$ and $20~μ$m strip widths. The observed scaling agrees with theoretical models and suggests the influence of film defects on vortex expulsion dynamics. This instrument enables high-throughput magnetic characterization of superconducting materials and circuits, providing new insight for flux mitigation strategies in scalable superconducting electronics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>磁通俘获是限制超导电子学可靠性与可扩展性的重大障碍，然而用于成像磁通涡旋的工具要么速度慢，要么灵敏度低。我们提出了一种低温宽场NV-金刚石磁显微镜，能够对超导器件中的磁通俘获进行快速、微米尺度的成像。利用该技术，我们测量了Nb薄膜和图形化条带中的涡旋排出场，揭示了在10至20微米条带宽度之间排出行为的交叉。观察到的标度关系与理论模型吻合，并表明薄膜缺陷对涡旋排出动力学的影响。该仪器能够对超导材料和电路进行高通量磁性表征，为可扩展超导电子学中的磁通缓解策略提供了新见解。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | Rohan T. Kapur et al. |
| 3 | **[Strong coupling between quantized magnon modes in a YIG microstucture and microwaves in a superconducting resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28145v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Strong-coupling experiments based on magnons enable the exploration into on-chip demonstrations involving numerous long-lived excitations. Yttrium iron garnet (YIG) has been considered for decades as a gold standard material for magnonics due to its low-loss magnonic properties. While YIG has successfully demonstrated strong-coupling in macroscopic device geometries, the strong coupling of magnons in truly sub-10 micron YIG structures to date has not yet been realized. This obstacle is due to the difficulty producing large enough effective magnonic mode volume necessary primarily due to thickness limitations of YIG deposition and device fabrication techniques. Here, we demonstrate the use of a microplatelet of YIG, manufactured from a single crystal of YIG via focused ion beam (FIB) techniques, placed on a constricted inductive line of an optimized superconducting lumped element LC resonator to achieve strong coupling between numerous magnon modes and the LC resonator photons. These experimental findings are qualitatively backed by micromagnetic simulations and quantitatively supported by analytical calculations to identify the magnon modes corresponding to the experimentally observed anti-crossings in the microwave transmission signal. Further, we show that these anti-crossings remain even at incredibly low device input powers ($\leq 10$ fW). The fabrication techniques and device geometry enable the deterministic use of numerous confined magnon modes in micron-scale YIG structures for various magnetic field strengths and orientations at substantially reduced device powers. The results here establish a foundational path forward to achieving efficient magnon-based strong-coupling experiments in micron-scale YIG magnetic elements for effective on-chip studies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>基于磁振子的强耦合实验使得探索涉及大量长寿命激发的片上演示成为可能。数十年来，钇铁石榴石（YIG）因其低损耗的磁振子特性，一直被视作磁振子学的黄金标准材料。尽管YIG已在宏观器件几何结构中成功展示了强耦合，但在真正亚10微米的YIG结构中实现磁振子的强耦合至今尚未实现。这一障碍源于难以产生足够大的有效磁振子模式体积，这主要是由于YIG沉积和器件制备技术的厚度限制所致。在此，我们演示了使用通过聚焦离子束（FIB）技术从YIG单晶制备的YIG微片，将其放置在优化超导集总元件LC谐振器的收缩电感线上，以实现众多磁振子模式与LC谐振器光子之间的强耦合。这些实验结果得到了微磁模拟的定性支持，并通过分析计算得到定量支撑，以识别与微波传输信号中实验观察到的反交叉相对应的磁振子模式。此外，我们表明即使在极低的器件输入功率（≤10 fW）下，这些反交叉仍然存在。该制备技术和器件几何结构使得能够在微米级YIG结构中，针对不同磁场强度和方向，以显著降低的器件功率确定性地利用众多受限磁振子模式。这些结果为在微米级YIG磁性元件中实现高效的、基于磁振子的强耦合实验以进行有效的片上研究奠定了基础路径。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | Seth W. Kurfman et al. |
| 4 | **[Programmable superconducting diode from nematic domain control in FeSe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26631v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The superconducting diode effect (SDE) allows polarity-dependent critical currents when time-reversal and current-inverting spatial symmetries are broken. Superconducting diodes show promise for applications, but inversion asymmetry is usually encoded in sample geometry or non-centrosymmetric crystals, rendering them static circuit elements. Here we demonstrate a programmable superconducting diode whose functionality is encoded in correlated electronic domains. We use the nematic superconductor FeSe as a platform and report a large intrinsic SDE with efficiencies up to $η\sim 75\%$ due to vortices interacting with nematic twin boundaries. The domain wall configuration thus encodes the SDE of the device. Through intense microsecond current pulses to quench the nematic order at rates exceeding $10^7$ K/s, we modify the domain pattern and control the polarity and strength of the SDE. These results establish a new paradigm in which superconducting circuit elements can be programmed through patterns imprinted into correlated electronic states.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管效应（SDE）允许在时间反演和电流反转空间对称性被破坏时产生依赖于极性的临界电流。超导二极管展现出应用前景，但反转不对称性通常编码在样品几何结构或非中心对称晶体中，使其成为静态电路元件。在此，我们展示了一种可编程超导二极管，其功能编码在关联电子畴中。我们以向列超导体FeSe为平台，并报告了由于涡旋与向列孪晶界相互作用而产生的大本征SDE，效率高达η~75%。因此，畴壁构型编码了器件的SDE。通过强度达微秒级的电流脉冲以超过10^7 K/s的速率淬灭向列序，我们改变了畴图案并控制了SDE的极性和强度。这些结果建立了一个新范式，其中超导电路元件可以通过印记在关联电子态中的图案进行编程。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | R. D. H. Hinlopen et al. |
| 5 | **[Local probing of superconductivity at oxide interfaces with atomic force microscopy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28077v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconductivity in strontium titanate has remained enigmatic for more than 50 years. The LaAlO$_3$/SrTiO$_3$ (LAO/STO) heterointerface enables systematic dimensional confinement, from a two-dimensional electron gas to quasi-one-dimensional nanostructures, providing access to this quantum state. Transport measurements in patterned devices reveal puzzling phenomena, including width-independent critical currents and anomalous pairing suggestive of one-dimensional behavior, but direct local probes of the patterned interface and its superconducting response have been lacking. Here we use ultralow-temperature non-contact atomic force microscopy, dissipation spectroscopy, and Kelvin probe force microscopy to locally probe signatures of superconductivity in patterned LAO/STO devices. Spatially resolved energy-dissipation measurements reveal superconducting signatures, with features confined in some devices to edge channels approximately 200 nm wide. Dissipation spectra exhibit a characteristic nonlinear bias dependence that provides a local diagnostic of superconductivity, consistent with the intermediate carrier-density regime near the superconducting dome, and persisting up to the critical field. These results establish atomic force microscopy as a local probe of superconductivity in patterned LAO/STO structures and provide a route to addressing longstanding questions about quantum confinement and transport anomalies in correlated oxide nanostructures.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>钛酸锶中的超导性在50多年来一直是个谜。LaAlO₃/SrTiO₃（LAO/STO）异质界面实现了从二维电子气到准一维纳米结构的系统性维度限制，为研究这一量子态提供了途径。图形化器件中的输运测量揭示了令人费解的现象，包括与宽度无关的临界电流和暗示一维行为的反常配对，但一直缺乏对图形化界面及其超导响应的直接局域探针。在此，我们使用超低温非接触原子力显微镜、耗散谱学和开尔文探针力显微镜，局域探测图形化LAO/STO器件中超导性的特征。空间分辨的能量耗散测量揭示了超导特征，在某些器件中这些特征被限制在约200纳米宽的边缘通道内。耗散谱表现出特征性的非线性偏压依赖性，这提供了超导性的局域诊断，与超导穹顶附近的中等载流子密度区域一致，并持续到临界场。这些结果确立了原子力显微镜作为图形化LAO/STO结构中超导性局域探针的地位，并为解决关于关联氧化物纳米结构中量子限制和输运反常的长期问题提供了途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | Dilek Yildiz et al. |
| 6 | **[Unusual critical currents in quasi-one-dimensional superconducting aluminum two-width structures in a magnetic field](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27881v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We measured unusual critical currents as functions of temperature in the zero field and as functions of a magnetic field perpendicular to the substrate surface at a given temperature close to the critical temperature in thin-film long quasi-one-dimensional superconducting aluminum two-width structures consisting of narrow and wide wires with different critical temperatures. It is found that the experimental critical switching current as a function of the field at a given temperature, determined by the appearance of a dc voltage on a short section of the structure, is nonlocal (dependent on electron transport in the area containing the junction line between the narrow and wide wires). When current flows through the narrow and wide wires of the structure, the switching currents, experimental and calculated within the framework of the Ginzburg-Landau theory, differ radically from each other. A nonzero switching current exists in high fields greater than the maximum critical magnetic field in a quasi-one-dimensional superconducting wire. In the aluminum two-width structures studied here, the unusual measured switching current challenges description by known theories.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们测量了薄膜长准一维超导铝双宽度结构（由具有不同临界温度的窄线和宽线构成）在零场下作为温度函数、以及在接近临界温度的给定温度下作为垂直于衬底表面的磁场函数的反常临界电流。研究发现，在给定温度下，由结构短段上出现直流电压所确定的实验临界开关电流作为磁场函数时具有非局域性（依赖于包含窄线与宽线之间结线区域的电子输运）。当电流流经结构的窄线和宽线时，实验测得的开关电流与在金兹堡-朗道理论框架内计算得到的开关电流存在根本性差异。在高于准一维超导线最大临界磁场的高场区域中，存在非零开关电流。在此研究的铝双宽度结构中，测得的反常开关电流对现有理论描述提出了挑战。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | V. I. Kuznetsov et al. |
| 7 | **[Shift of the maxima of the critical currents of different polarity relative to the zero magnetic flux along the flux axis in a superconducting asymmetric aluminum ring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27848v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We measured the rectification of an ac voltage in a structure of superconducting circularly-asymmetric aluminum rings in series, permeated with a magnetic flux and biased with a low-frequency alternating current (without a dc component). This rectification is due to the shift of the maxima of the critical currents of different polarity relative to the zero flux in opposite directions along the flux axis in the asymmetric ring. For the first time, we propose a model for a temperature-dependent phase shift equal to difference between dimensionless kinetic inductances of wide and narrow semirings having the same length and thickness. The shift is not zero in the case of different critical currents densities in both semirings. This is possible only in a situation of different critical temperatures of both semirings. The model describes well the temperature-dependent shift of the maxima of the critical currents, answers the long-standing mysterious challenge of the shift and removes extremely strange contradiction between the results of different measurements, previously found in circularly-asymmetric aluminum structures.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们测量了由超导圆不对称铝环串联而成的结构（通有磁通量并以低频交流电流偏置，不含直流分量）中的交流电压整流效应。该整流效应源于不对称环中不同极性临界电流的最大值沿磁通轴相对于零磁通方向相反地偏移。我们首次提出了一个温度依赖的相位偏移模型，该偏移等于具有相同长度和厚度的宽、窄半环的无量纲动感电感之差。当两个半环的临界电流密度不同时，该偏移不为零。这种情况仅可能发生在两个半环具有不同临界温度的条件下。该模型很好地描述了临界电流最大值的温度依赖偏移，解答了长期悬而未决的偏移难题，并消除了先前在圆不对称铝结构中发现的不同测量结果之间极其矛盾的异常现象。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | V. I. Kuznetsov et al. |
| 8 | **[Critical temperatures and critical currents of wide and narrow quasi-one-dimensional superconducting aluminum structures in zero magnetic field](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27822v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We measured the critical temperatures and critical switching and retrapping currents of wide and narrow thin-film quasi-one-dimensional superconducting aluminum structures of the same thickness in zero magnetic field. For the first time, we found that the narrower the structure, the lower the critical temperature and critical current density in the structure. Probably, the influence of depairing centers that are on dirty longitudinal boundaries of the structure, is the stronger than the narrower the structure. It is found for the first time that, in most cases, the temperature-dependent switching critical current in both structures is approximated by two functions. At temperatures below the temperature corresponding to the bottom of the resistive N-S transition of structures, the switching critical current is described by the Kupriyanov-Lukichev theory. At temperatures close to the top of the N-S transition, the switching current is linear with temperature and coincides with the critical Josephson current. At these temperatures, Josephson SNS junctions are formed in structures.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们在零磁场下测量了相同厚度的宽、窄薄膜准一维超导铝结构的临界温度以及临界开关电流和重俘获电流。首次发现，结构越窄，其临界温度和临界电流密度越低。这可能是由于位于结构脏纵向边界上的解对中心的影响随结构变窄而增强。首次发现，在大多数情况下，两种结构中温度依赖的开关临界电流可由两个函数近似描述。在低于结构电阻性正常-超导转变底部对应温度的温度下，开关临界电流符合库普里扬诺夫-卢基切夫理论。在接近正常-超导转变顶部的温度下，开关电流与温度呈线性关系，并与临界约瑟夫森电流一致。在这些温度下，结构中形成了约瑟夫森SNS结。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | V. I. Kuznetsov et al. |
| 9 | **[Chern number reversal and emergent superconductivity in rhombohedral graphene induced by in-plane magnetic fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27788v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Rhombohedral graphene with topological flat bands offers an ideal platform for realizing correlated and topological quantum phases. Here we investigate hBN aligned eight-layer rhombohedral graphene moire superlattices, which host a robust quantum anomalous Hall (QAH) state alongside three unconventional superconducting phases. For electron-doped carriers away from the moire potential, we observe QAH Chern number reversal driven by the displacement fields and in plane magnetic fields. For hole-doped carriers near the moire superlattice, the three superconducting phases exhibit distinctively different in plane magnetic field responses: one is weakly enhanced, the second is strongly suppressed, and the third exclusively induced by in plane magnetic field. The isotropic in plane magnetic field response in the QAH regime points to interplay between orbital magnetism and spin-orbit coupling, and the field-emergent superconductivity provides compelling evidence for spin-triplet pairing. Our work demonstrates a highly versatile platform for coexisting topological and superconducting states, and highlights in plane magnetic field as a powerful in-situ control knob for engineering novel quantum devices.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>具有拓扑平带的菱方石墨烯为实现关联和拓扑量子相提供了理想平台。本文研究了hBN对齐的八层菱方石墨烯莫尔超晶格，该体系同时呈现出稳健的量子反常霍尔态和三个非常规超导相。对于远离莫尔势的电子掺杂载流子，我们观察到由位移场和面内磁场驱动的量子反常霍尔陈数反转。对于靠近莫尔超晶格的空穴掺杂载流子，三个超导相表现出截然不同的面内磁场响应：一个微弱增强，一个强烈抑制，第三个则完全由面内磁场诱导产生。量子反常霍尔区域中各向同性的面内磁场响应揭示了轨道磁性与自旋-轨道耦合之间的相互作用，而场致超导现象则为自旋三重态配对提供了有力证据。我们的工作展示了一个高度通用的拓扑态与超导态共存平台，并凸显了面内磁场作为原位调控手段在新型量子器件设计中的强大作用。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | Xiaozhou Zan et al. |
| 10 | **[Spin responses of a disordered helical superconducting edge under Zeeman field](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.04263v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate analytically and numerically the effects of disorder on the helical edge of the 2D topological insulator in the presence of the Zeeman field and superconductivity. Employing bosonization and a renormalization-group analysis, we study how impurity potentials modify charge- and spin-density wave correlations as well as superconducting pair correlations. Our results reveal that the Zeeman field controls the competition: in the attractive regime, it amplifies the superconducting gap, while in the repulsive regime, it stabilizes impurity effects by keeping the system longer in the relevant regime for disorder. We also find that disorder induces logarithmic suppression of transverse density-wave correlations, while at the same time introducing positive logarithmic corrections that enhance superconducting pair correlations and contribute to their stability. These effects directly modify the scaling of spin conductance, providing experimentally accessible signatures of the interplay between disorder and superconductivity in topological edge channels.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们通过解析和数值方法研究了在塞曼场和超导存在下无序对二维拓扑绝缘体螺旋边缘的影响。利用玻色化方法和重整化群分析，我们探讨了杂质势如何改变电荷密度波、自旋密度波关联以及超导对关联。结果表明，塞曼场控制着竞争关系：在吸引区间，它增强超导能隙；在排斥区间，它通过使系统更长时间保持在无序相关区间来稳定杂质效应。我们还发现，无序会对数地抑制横向密度波关联，同时引入正的对数修正，从而增强超导对关联并促进其稳定性。这些效应直接改变了自旋电导的标度行为，为拓扑边缘通道中无序与超导的相互作用提供了实验可观测的特征。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | Zeinab Bakhshipour et al. |
| 11 | **[Magnetic Quantum Criticality inside the Superconducting State Revealed by Penetration Depth Scaling with Local $T_{\mathrm c}$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27507v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We demonstrate a magnetic quantum critical point embedded within the superconducting state of Zn-doped CeCoIn$_5$, revealed by a pronounced peak in the magnetic penetration depth at zero temperature $λ(0)$. Using scanning SQUID microscopy, we determine the local superconducting transition temperature $T_{\mathrm c}$ and $λ(0)$. By parameterizing $λ(0)$ in terms of the local $T_{\mathrm c}$ rather than nominal Zn substitution, we circumvent the ambiguity caused by doping inhomogeneity and enable a more precise extraction of the critical exponent. The extracted exponent exceeds the clean spin-density-wave value, indicating a disorder-modified quantum critical regime. The enhancement of $λ(0)$ reflects the suppression of the superfluid stiffness and is consistent with critical scaling. Our approach provides a route to uncover intrinsic quantum critical behavior hidden by inhomogeneity in unconventional superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们在掺锌CeCoIn₅的超导态内部发现了一个磁量子临界点，该临界点由零温磁穿透深度λ(0)的显著峰值揭示。通过扫描SQUID显微镜，我们测定了局域超导转变温度T_c和λ(0)。通过将λ(0)参数化为局域T_c的函数（而非名义锌掺杂量），我们规避了掺杂不均匀性造成的歧义，从而更精确地提取了临界指数。提取的临界指数超过了纯净自旋密度波体系的理论值，表明存在无序修正的量子临界区域。λ(0)的增强反映了超流刚度的抑制，并与临界标度行为一致。我们的方法为揭示非常规超导体中因不均匀性而隐藏的本征量子临界行为提供了途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | Yusuke Iguchi et al. |
| 12 | **[Superconductivity-Enabled Conversion of Ferromagnetic Resonance into Standing Spin Waves](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27076v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconductors can transport spin without Joule dissipation, yet their coherent coupling to short-wavelength magnons in insulating magnets remains largely unexplored. Here we demonstrate experimentally and theoretically that a conventional diffusive superconductor can enable the conversion of the uniform ferromagnetic-resonance (FMR) mode into perpendicular standing spin waves (PSSWs) in an adjacent ferrimagnetic insulator. In Bi-substituted iron-garnet/Nb bilayers, the microwave transmission develops an additional resonance feature that appears only below the Nb transition temperature and lies close to the uniform FMR peak. A microscopic theory that self-consistently couples the quasiclassical Keldysh--Usadel description of the superconducting condensate to the Landau--Lifshitz--Gilbert dynamics shows that the conversion requires two ingredients: (i) an interfacial spin-transfer torque mediated by spin-polarized triplet Cooper pairs and (ii) a depth-dependent effective field produced by Abrikosov vortices (electromagnetic proximity). The resulting susceptibility reproduces the measured lineshapes and establishes superconductivity as an active control knob for exchange standing-wave modes in magnetic insulators.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导体可在无焦耳耗散的情况下输运自旋，但其与绝缘磁体中短波长磁子的相干耦合仍鲜有探索。本文通过实验与理论证明，传统扩散型超导体能够将均匀铁磁共振（FMR）模式转化为相邻亚铁磁绝缘体中的垂直自旋驻波（PSSW）。在Bi取代铁石榴石/Nb双层膜中，微波透射谱在Nb转变温度以下出现额外共振特征，该特征位于均匀FMR峰附近。通过自洽耦合超导凝聚体的准经典Keldysh-Usadel描述与Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert动力学的微观理论表明，该转化需要两个要素：（i）由自旋极化三重态库珀对介导的界面自旋转移矩；（ii）Abrikosov涡旋产生的深度依赖有效场（电磁邻近效应）。由此得到的磁化率可复现实测线形，并确立了超导性作为磁性绝缘体中交换驻波模式主动调控手段的作用。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Ya. V. Turkin et al. |
| 13 | **[Non-local Tunneling Spectroscopy of Inelastic Quasiparticle Relaxation in Superconducting 1-D Wires](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26862v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Non-local conductance experiments using tunnel junctions can provide valuable spectroscopic information on both the transport and relaxation of quasiparticles in superconductors, as these techniques directly probe the quasiparticle charge and energy imbalance even at mK temperatures. In this work, we employ mesoscopic three terminal Cu and Al NIS devices to study non-local quasiparticle transport over length-scales on the order of the superconducting coherence length in this regime. Via a dual-bias scheme, which utilizes detector biases both above and below the superconducting gap, we are able to extract the effect of quasiparticle energy imbalance via its impact on the self consistent pair potential by symmetry considerations. We observe non-local conductance features due to pair-breaking which are anti-symmetric with respect to the polarity of the voltage bias, with a sharp onset during single electron tunneling at energies around $3Δ$. We compare these findings with quasiclassical simulations including inelastic effects to obtain estimates of the energy dependent inelastic scattering time. In addition, we demonstrate kinetic effects due to a large applied supercurrent which can also be captured in this formalism and decomposed with respect to the particle-hole symmetry and supercurrent direction, and discuss further opportunities for the advancement of this method.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>利用隧道结进行非局域电导实验，可为超导体中准粒子的输运和弛豫提供有价值的光谱信息，因为即使在毫开尔文温度下，这些技术也能直接探测准粒子电荷和能量不平衡。在本工作中，我们采用介观三端铜和铝NIS器件，研究在此条件下超导相干长度尺度上的非局域准粒子输运。通过双偏置方案（利用探测器偏置分别高于和低于超导能隙），我们能够通过对称性考虑，从自洽对势受准粒子能量不平衡的影响中提取其效应。我们观察到由对破缺引起的非局域电导特征，该特征相对于电压偏置极性呈反对称，并在约$3Δ$能量处的单电子隧穿过程中出现尖锐的起始点。我们将这些发现与包含非弹性效应的准经典模拟进行比较，以估算能量依赖的非弹性散射时间。此外，我们展示了由大外加超流引起的动力学效应，该效应也可在此形式体系中捕获，并可根据粒子-空穴对称性和超流方向进行分解，同时讨论了该方法进一步发展的机遇。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Kevin M. Ryan et al. |
| 14 | **[Engineering superconductivity on the surface of Weyl semimetals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26859v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Ten years after the experimental discovery of Weyl semimetals, theoretical and experimental work has pointed to the possibility of realizing surface-only superconductivity at relatively high temperatures in these materials. A consensus is developing that this unusual form of superconductivity is mediated by surface electronic states unique to Weyl semimetals, known as Fermi arcs. In this work, we show that the topological protection of these exotic states can be exploited to engineer high critical temperatures. Motivated by a real-material example (PtBi$_2$), we demonstrate that surface van Hove singularities can be induced by depositing a suitable additional layer on top of the Weyl surface. We also investigate the role of these singularities in raising the critical temperature, showing that it is significantly enhanced when the chemical potential lies in their vicinity. More generally, our results demonstrate how topological protection can be exploited to manipulate surface electronic states, thereby opening experimentally accessible routes toward engineering high-temperature two-dimensional superconductivity and other exotic phases.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在实验发现外尔半金属十年后，理论和实验工作指出，在这些材料中可能实现相对高温下的表面超导电性。一种共识正在形成，即这种不寻常的超导电性是由外尔半金属特有的表面电子态（称为费米弧）所介导。在本工作中，我们展示了可以利用这些奇特态的拓扑保护来设计高临界温度。受真实材料实例（PtBi$_2$）的启发，我们证明可以通过在外尔表面沉积合适的附加层来诱导表面范霍夫奇点。我们还研究了这些奇点在提高临界温度中的作用，表明当化学势位于其附近时，临界温度显著增强。更广泛地说，我们的结果展示了如何利用拓扑保护来操纵表面电子态，从而为设计高温二维超导及其他奇异相开辟了实验上可行的途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Riccardo Vocaturo et al. |
| 15 | **[Negative nonlocal and local voltages (resistances) in a quasi-one-dimensional superconducting aluminum structure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26814v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>To study a nonlocal electron transport in an aluminum superconducting quasi-one-dimensional structure, we measured negative nonlocal (local) direct current voltages in the structure in a magnetic field near the critical temperature. The structure is a normal-superconducting at $T_{cn}<T<T_{cw}$ ($T_{cn}$ and $T_{cw}$ are the critical temperatures for narrow and wide wires, respectively, making up this structure). Negative voltage arises due to a quasiparticle current flowing through the N-S interface. We plotted the experimental and theoretical temperature and magnetic-field dependences of current, resistance and voltage corresponding to the peak of negative voltage, taking into account either equilibrium or nonequilibrium superconducting fluctuations.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>为了研究铝超导准一维结构中的非局域电子输运，我们在接近临界温度的磁场中测量了该结构中的负非局域（局域）直流电压。该结构在$T_{cn}<T<T_{cw}$（$T_{cn}$和$T_{cw}$分别为构成该结构的窄线和宽线的临界温度）下处于正常-超导状态。负电压的产生源于通过N-S界面的准粒子流。我们绘制了对应于负电压峰值的电流、电阻和电压的实验与理论温度和磁场依赖关系，并考虑了平衡或非平衡超导涨落。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | V. I. Kuznetsov et al. |
| 16 | **[A cm-wave quantum noise limited resonant superconducting parametric amplifier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26543v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting Parametric Amplifiers (SPAs) have seen great interest in recent years due to their high gain and quantum limited noise performance. Among these amplifiers, resonant SPAs have been widely developed for experiments where ultra low-noise narrow-band amplification is of interest, such as the search for Axion dark matter in particle physics and the detection of spectroscopic lines in astrophysics, while also finding applications in quantum computing. This work presents an amplifier based on a Complementary Split Ring Resonator (CSRR), patterned on a NbTi coated sapphire substrate embedded within a waveguide, designed to work at a set of four narrow frequency bands throughout K band (18-27 GHz) using the kinetic inductance of the superconducting film. The S-parameters measured at 400 mK, using a sorption cooler, show the four resonances between 23.3 and 26.3 GHz at 1 GHz spacing, with a maximum transmission on resonance of -1 dB. Four-wave mixing has been observed with each resonance, and a maximum signal gain of 30 dB has been measured, corresponding to 29 dB of insertion gain. The noise performance of the amplifier has been measured, showing an added noise of 1.2 half quanta at 400 mK. These results are relevant to high-frequency Axion dark matter experiments and help motivate the exploration of higher frequencies in quantum technologies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导参量放大器（SPA）近年来因其高增益和量子极限噪声性能而备受关注。在这些放大器中，谐振式SPA已被广泛开发用于需要超低噪声窄带放大的实验，例如粒子物理学中的轴子暗物质搜索和天体物理学中的光谱线探测，同时在量子计算中也有应用。本工作提出了一种基于互补开口环谐振器（CSRR）的放大器，该谐振器制作在嵌入波导的NbTi涂层蓝宝石衬底上，设计利用超导薄膜的动电感在K波段（18-27 GHz）内的四个窄频带工作。使用吸附制冷机在400 mK下测量的S参数显示，在23.3至26.3 GHz之间有四个谐振点，间隔为1 GHz，谐振时的最大传输为-1 dB。每个谐振点均观察到四波混频，测得最大信号增益为30 dB，对应插入增益为29 dB。测量了放大器的噪声性能，显示在400 mK下附加噪声为1.2个半量子。这些结果与高频轴子暗物质实验相关，并有助于推动量子技术中更高频率的探索。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | V. Gilles et al. |
| 17 | **[Spatially anisotropic Kondo resonance coupled with the superconducting gap in a kagome metal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.20735v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The chromium-based kagome metal CsCr3Sb5 has garnered significant interest due to its strong electron correlations, intertwined orders and potential for unconventional superconductivity under high pressure. The evolution of magnetic and superconducting interactions as the more frequently studied CsV3Sb5 is doped to CsCr3Sb5 remains poorly understood. Here, we demonstrate the emergence of a spatially anisotropic Kondo resonance intertwined with the superconducting gap, enabled by introducing magnetic Cr impurities into the kagome superconductor CsV3Sb5. The addition of dilute Cr impurities not only weakens long range charge density wave order but also produces local magnetic moments that leads to Kondo resonances. We show that the Kondo resonance forms anisotropic, ripple like spatial patterns around individual Cr atoms, breaking all local mirror symmetries. We further reveal that with the emergence of Kondo screening, the coherence peak and depth of superconducting gap with finite zero-energy conductance are enhanced. This suggests that non superconducting carriers at the Fermi surface in the parent compound participate in the Kondo effect, simultaneously screening Cr magnetic moments and increasing the superfluid density. Our findings offer an opportunity to study the interplay between superconductivity and local magnetism in kagome materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>基于铬的kagome金属CsCr3Sb5因其强电子关联、相互交织的序以及高压下非常规超导的潜力而备受关注。随着更常研究的CsV3Sb5掺杂至CsCr3Sb5，磁性与超导相互作用的演化仍知之甚少。在此，我们展示了通过向kagome超导体CsV3Sb5中引入磁性Cr杂质，一种空间各向异性的近藤共振态与超导能隙相互交织而出现。添加少量Cr杂质不仅削弱了长程电荷密度波序，还产生了导致近藤共振的局域磁矩。我们发现，近藤共振在单个Cr原子周围形成各向异性的波纹状空间图案，打破了所有局域镜面对称性。我们进一步揭示，随着近藤屏蔽的出现，具有有限零能量电导的超导能隙的相干峰和深度均得到增强。这表明母体化合物费米面上的非超导载流子参与了近藤效应，同时屏蔽了Cr磁矩并增加了超流密度。我们的发现为研究kagome材料中超导与局域磁性之间的相互作用提供了契机。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Zichen Huang et al. |
| 18 | **[From Wavefunction Collapse to Superconductivity: Evolution of the Electronic State in Compressed GaNb4Se8](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26203v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Understanding how electronic transport evolves from localized to itinerant regimes in correlated cluster solids remains an important challenge in condensed-matter physics. Here we investigate the pressure-dependent transport properties of the lacunar spinel GaNb4Se8, a cluster Mott insulator at ambient conditions. At low pressures, the resistivity follows Efros-Shklovskii variable-range hopping, indicating Coulomb-gap-controlled carrier localization (x ~ 6.1 Angstrom). A crossover toward metallic transport begins near ~ 5 GPa, whereas a crystallographic transition from the cubic phase to a monoclinic C2 phase occurs at significantly higher pressure (~ 20 GPa), establishing a hierarchy characterized by the decoupling of electronic delocalization from structural symmetry change. At higher pressures, superconductivity (xi(0) ~ 80-90 Angstrom) emerges from the correlated metallic regime. These results identify GaNb4Se8 as a platform for studying correlation-controlled transport evolution in cluster-based solids.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>理解关联团簇固体中电子输运如何从局域化演变为巡游态，仍是凝聚态物理学中的一个重要挑战。在此，我们研究了缺位尖晶石GaNb4Se8（一种在环境条件下为团簇Mott绝缘体的材料）的压力依赖输运性质。在低压下，电阻率遵循Efros-Shklovskii变程跳跃，表明存在库仑能隙控制的载流子局域化（x ~ 6.1 Å）。向金属输运的交叉始于约5 GPa附近，而立方相到单斜C2相的晶体学转变发生在显著更高的压力下（约20 GPa），这建立了一种以电子离域与结构对称性变化解耦为特征的层级关系。在更高压力下，超导性（ξ(0) ~ 80-90 Å）从关联金属态中涌现。这些结果将GaNb4Se8确定为研究团簇基固体中关联控制输运演化的平台。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Yuejian Wang et al. |
| 19 | **[Thermodynamic Identification of the Internal Superconducting Phase Boundary in UTe$_2$ for $H \parallel b$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25896v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The $H$--$T$ phase diagram of UTe$_2$ for magnetic field along the hard $b$ axis contains an unresolved internal boundary near $μ_0H \sim 14$--15~T, previously inferred from ac susceptibility and transport experiments but lacking thermodynamic evidence. We report ultrasound results for several elastic modes in an ultraclean UTe$_2$ single crystal with $T_c>2$~K for $H \parallel b$ down to 0.33~K and up to 18~T. A pronounced anomaly in the longitudinal $C_{33}$ mode, with a weaker response in $C_{44}$ and no resolvable anomaly in $C_{55}$, establishes this feature as a bulk thermodynamic phase boundary and reveals a symmetry-selective coupling to lattice strain. The phase line remains nearly constant in field near 14~T and terminates near 13.5~T and 1.25~K at a tetracritical point, providing the thermodynamic evidence for the fourth phase boundary in the $H$--$T$ phase diagram. The results constrain the order-parameter structure of the high-field phase and support field-induced multicomponent superconductivity in UTe$_2$.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>对于沿硬b轴方向的磁场，UTe₂的H-T相图在μ₀H ~ 14–15 T附近包含一条未解明的内部边界，此前由交流磁化率和输运实验推断得出，但缺乏热力学证据。我们报告了在Tc > 2 K的超净UTe₂单晶中，沿H ∥ b方向、温度低至0.33 K、磁场高达18 T时，多种弹性模量的超声测量结果。纵向C₃₃模出现显著异常，C₄₄模响应较弱，而C₅₅模无可分辨的异常，这将该特征确立为体热力学相边界，并揭示了与晶格应变的对称性选择性耦合。该相线在14 T附近几乎保持恒定场强，并在13.5 T和1.25 K附近终止于一个四临界点，为H-T相图中的第四条相边界提供了热力学证据。这些结果约束了高场相的序参量结构，并支持UTe₂中场致多分量超导性。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Michal Vališka et al. |
| 20 | **[Bragg-Williams order competes with superconductivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25843v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Orderings in charge and spin have been extensively studied to unravel their correlation to emergent superconductivity over the past decades. Bragg-Williams order (BWO), a classical structural order parameter describing site occupancy in alloys, has long been speculated to influence superconducting behavior. Yet, its role still remains ambiguous, largely due to the difficulty of isolating BWO from concomitant charge doping or competing electronic instabilities. Here, we establish In2/3PSe3 as a platform wherein indium vacancies are reversibly configurable between ordered and disordered states via thermal treatment. We show that the disordered phase undergoes a pressure-induced superconducting transition with a Tc of 11 K, significantly higher than the 7 K observed in its ordered counterpart. This constitutes a rare instance in which pure BWO variation drives a substantial shift in Tc. By combining a Ginzburg-Landau phenomenological analysis with a BCS-McMillan microscopic description, we demonstrate that BWO naturally suppresses superconductivity through electron-phonon interactions, a mechanism supported by ultra-low-wavenumber Raman measurements. Our findings support BWO as an independent order parameter that competes directly with superconductivity, extending the concept of competing orders beyond conventional electronic and magnetic degrees of freedom.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>过去几十年来，电荷和自旋的有序化被广泛研究以揭示其与新现超导性的关联。布拉格-威廉姆斯有序（BWO）——一种描述合金中位点占据的经典结构序参量——长期以来被推测会影响超导行为。然而，其作用仍不明确，这很大程度上是由于难以将BWO与伴随的电荷掺杂或竞争性电子不稳定性区分开来。在此，我们确立了In₂/₃PSe₃作为一个平台，其中铟空位可通过热处理在有序态和无序态之间可逆配置。我们表明，无序相经历压力诱导的超导转变，Tc为11 K，显著高于其有序对应物所观察到的7 K。这构成了一个罕见的实例，即纯BWO变化驱动了Tc的显著变化。通过结合金兹堡-朗道唯象分析与BCS-麦克米兰微观描述，我们证明了BWO通过电子-声子相互作用自然抑制了超导性，这一机制得到了超低波数拉曼测量的支持。我们的发现支持BWO作为一个独立序参量，直接与超导性竞争，将竞争序的概念扩展到传统的电子和磁自由度之外。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Xu Liu et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[The Synergistic Route to Stretched Criticality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28003v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Griffiths phases are typically associated with quenched disorder, while frustration gives rise to multistability and spin-glass behavior. Whether extended criticality can arise in other contexts remains an open question. Here, we show that synergistic interactions provide a distinct route to non-conventional critical phenomena. By combining spreading mechanisms that reinforce activity through complementary pathways, we uncover a broad distribution of relaxation rates, leading to Griffiths-like slow dynamics and extended criticality. We demonstrate that this mechanism is robust across networks and emerges both in systems with explicit higher-order interactions and in purely pairwise systems with nonlinear dynamics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>格里菲斯相通常与淬火无序相关，而阻挫则引发多稳态和自旋玻璃行为。在其它情境下是否会出现扩展临界性仍是一个悬而未决的问题。本文研究表明，协同相互作用为非传统临界现象提供了一条独特路径。通过结合通过互补途径增强活性的传播机制，我们发现了弛豫率的广泛分布，从而产生类格里菲斯慢动力学和扩展临界性。我们证明该机制在网络中具有鲁棒性，并且既出现在具有显式高阶相互作用的系统中，也出现在具有非线性动力学的纯成对系统中。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | Lorenzo Lucarini et al. |
| 2 | **[Protein folding on a 64 qubit trapped-ion hardware via counterdiabatic quantum optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26861v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report the largest trapped-ion hardware demonstration of lattice protein-folding optimization to date, using bias-field digitized counterdiabatic quantum optimization (BF-DCQO) on a fully connected 64-qubit Barium development system similar to the forthcoming IonQ Tempo line. Six peptide sequences with 14-16 amino-acid residues are encoded using a coarse-grained tetrahedral lattice model, yielding higher-order spin-glass Hamiltonians with long-range interactions involving up to five-body terms and mapped to 46-61 qubits. The resulting instances are demanding for near-term quantum hardware because low-energy configurations must satisfy backbone-geometry constraints while optimizing dense residue-contact interactions. BF-DCQO uses a non-variational bias-feedback mechanism, where low-energy samples from each round define longitudinal fields that guide subsequent quantum evolutions. Across the studied instances, BF-DCQO shifts raw sampled energy distributions toward lower energies than uniform random sampling, with the strongest improvements appearing in residue-contact variables. To preserve this signal, we introduce a consensus-based post-processing pipeline that combines quantum-learned contact information with feasible backbone geometries. The resulting hybrid workflow reaches the classical reference energy in multiple instances and improves over the corresponding random-seeded pipeline. These results show that BF-DCQO can generate structured samples for dense protein-folding Hamiltonians at previously unexplored trapped-ion scales.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们报道了迄今为止最大规模的晶格蛋白质折叠优化囚禁离子硬件演示，在类似于即将推出的IonQ Tempo系列的64量子比特全连接钡离子开发系统上，采用偏置场数字化反绝热量子优化（BF-DCQO）方法。使用粗粒化四面体晶格模型编码了六种含14-16个氨基酸残基的肽序列，生成了包含最多五体项长程相互作用的高阶自旋玻璃哈密顿量，并映射至46-61个量子比特。由于低能构型必须在优化密集残基接触相互作用的同时满足主链几何约束，这些实例对近期量子硬件提出了较高要求。BF-DCQO采用非变分偏置反馈机制，利用每轮迭代中的低能样本定义纵向场，从而引导后续量子演化。在所研究的实例中，BF-DCQO将原始采样能量分布向低于均匀随机采样的方向偏移，其中残基接触变量的改进最为显著。为保留该信号，我们引入基于共识的后处理流程，将量子学习到的接触信息与可行主链几何结构相结合。由此产生的混合工作流在多个实例中达到经典参考能量，并优于相应的随机种子工作流。这些结果表明，BF-DCQO能够在先前未探索的囚禁离子规模下，为密集蛋白质折叠哈密顿量生成结构化样本。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Alejandro Gomez Cadavid et al. |
| 3 | **[Griffiths inequalities and Gibbs-Bogoliubov inequality for general gauge glasses with Gaussian disorder on Nishimori line](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25697v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We consider a class of gauge glass models with Gaussian disorder on the Nishimori line, including the Ising spin glass, the $XY$ gauge glass, the $Z_q$ gauge glass, and the gauge-invariant Potts model. We prove that the first and second Griffiths inequalities hold for these models on arbitrary lattice structures. As a consequence, both the pressure and the correlation functions are monotonically increasing with respect to the inverse temperature along the Nishimori line. Furthermore, we establish an analogue of the Gibbs--Bogoliubov inequality for this class of models. This result implies that, on the Nishimori line, the approximate quenched free energy obtained via the replica method with a replica-symmetric mean-field approximation is always greater than the true quenched free energy. Our results provide a broad generalization of previous results established for the Ising spin glass with Gaussian disorder on the Nishimori line.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们考虑西森线上具有高斯无序的一类规范玻璃模型，包括伊辛自旋玻璃、$XY$规范玻璃、$Z_q$规范玻璃以及规范不变波茨模型。我们证明，在任意晶格结构上，这些模型的第一和第二Griffiths不等式成立。由此可知，沿西森线，压强和关联函数均随逆温度单调递增。此外，我们为该类模型建立了吉布斯-博戈留博夫不等式的类比形式。该结果表明，在西森线上，通过复制对称平均场近似的复制方法获得的近似淬火自由能始终大于真实淬火自由能。我们的结果对先前针对西森线上高斯无序伊辛自旋玻璃所建立的结果进行了广泛推广。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Manaka Okuyama et al. |
| 4 | **[Replica Theory of Spherical Boltzmann Machine Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17936v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Training in machine learning generally consists in finding one model, whose parameters minimize a data-dependent loss. Yet, empirical work shows that ensemble learning, an approach in which multiple models are sampled, can improve performance. Here, we provide an analytical framework to understand these observations in the case of Boltzmann machines, exploiting a duality between ensemble learning and large deviations of the free energy in spin-glass models. Replica calculations allow us to fully solve the case of spherical Boltzmann machine ensembles, and clarify when ensemble learning improves over standard loss minimization, in particular for nearly finite-dimensional data. Our framework can also be applied to complex data distributions, in agreement with numerical simulations on deep networks.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>机器学习训练通常旨在寻找单一模型，其参数能最小化数据相关的损失函数。然而实证研究表明，采用多模型采样的集成学习方法可提升性能。本文针对玻尔兹曼机建立分析框架，利用集成学习与自旋玻璃模型中自由能大偏差理论的对偶性来解释上述现象。通过副本计算，我们完整求解了球形玻尔兹曼机集成问题，阐明了集成学习在何种条件下优于标准损失最小化方法——尤其是针对近有限维数据。该框架还可应用于复杂数据分布，与深度网络数值模拟结果一致。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Thomas Tulinski et al. |
| 5 | **[Bayesian phase transition for the critical Ising model: Enlarged replica symmetry in the epsilon expansion and in 2D](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23346v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>A process that images or measures bond energies in the critical Ising model can be in distinct measurement ``phases'', depending on the precision of measurement. We study the transition into the strong-measurement phase using replica field theory (an epsilon expansion around six dimensions) and numerical simulations in two dimensions. The results reveal multiscaling of correlation functions at the critical point, and a striking enlarged symmetry of the replica description. This is an analog of the Nishimori phenomenon in the Ising spin glass, in a distinct replica limit. The enlarged symmetry is present microscopically for certain measurement protocols, but more generally can emerge in the infrared, and it fixes the exact value of the exponent for the Edwards-Anderson correlator both in 2D and near the upper critical dimension. We also examine the epsilon expansion for models with power-law interactions and/or long-range measurement.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>对临界伊辛模型中键能进行成像或测量的过程，根据测量精度可处于不同的测量"相"。我们采用副本场论（六维ε展开）与二维数值模拟研究强测量相变。结果表明临界点关联函数存在多标度行为，且副本描述呈现显著的对称性增强现象。这对应于伊辛自旋玻璃中Nishimori现象在特定副本极限下的类比。该增强对称性在特定测量协议下具有微观起源，但更普遍情况下可在红外区域涌现，并精确确定了二维及上临界维度附近Edwards-Anderson关联函数的临界指数。我们还研究了具有幂律相互作用和/或长程测量模型的ε展开。</p></details> | 2026-04-25 | Kay Joerg Wiese et al. |
| 6 | **[Autonomous Emergence of Hamiltonian in Deep Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20821v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The unprecedented predictive success of deep generative models in complex many-body systems, such as AlphaFold3, raises an epistemological question: do these networks merely memorize data distributions via high-dimensional interpolation, or do they autonomously deduce the underlying physical laws? To address this, we introduce a rigorous algebraic framework to extract the implicit physical interactions learned by generative models. By establishing an exact equivalence between the zero-noise limit of a Riemannian diffusion score field and the thermodynamic restoring force, we utilize the trained neural network as a direct force estimator. Applying this framework to a sequence-dependent, frustrated 1D $O(3)$ spin glass, we probe the latent representations of an $O(3)$-equivariant attention architecture trained solely on thermal equilibrium snapshots. Without incorporating any energetic priors, an overdetermined linear inversion successfully recovers the microscopic Hamiltonian parameters of the spin system. The inferred Hamiltonian parameters exhibit a $99.7\%$ cosine similarity with the ground-truth interaction parameters. Furthermore, these sparse local parameters alone are sufficient to explain $87\%$ of the variance in the continuous force field predicted by the network. Our results provide quantitative, falsifiable evidence that deep generative architectures do not merely perform statistical pattern matching, but autonomously discover and internalize the underlying physical rules.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>深度生成模型在复杂多体系统（如AlphaFold3）中取得了前所未有的预测成功，这引发了一个认识论问题：这些网络仅仅是通过高维插值来记忆数据分布，还是自主推导出了潜在的物理定律？为解决此问题，我们引入了一个严格的代数框架来提取生成模型所学习的隐式物理相互作用。通过建立黎曼扩散得分场零噪声极限与热力学恢复力之间的精确等价关系，我们将训练好的神经网络用作直接的力估计器。将该框架应用于一个序列依赖、受挫的一维$O(3)$自旋玻璃模型，我们探究了一个仅基于热平衡快照训练的$O(3)$等变注意力架构的潜在表征。在不引入任何能量先验的情况下，一个超定线性反演成功恢复了自旋系统的微观哈密顿量参数。推断出的哈密顿量参数与真实相互作用参数的余弦相似度达到$99.7\%$。此外，仅凭这些稀疏的局域参数就能解释网络预测的连续力场中$87\%$的方差。我们的结果提供了定量、可证伪的证据，表明深度生成架构并非仅仅执行统计模式匹配，而是自主发现并内化了潜在的物理规则。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Wenjie Xi et al. |
| 7 | **[Tensor network surrogate models for variational quantum computation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20180v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We adopt a two-dimensional tensor-network (TN) ansatz to simulate variational quantum algorithms on two-dimensional qubit architectures, demonstrating its capability to accurately simulate deep circuits through the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) applied to Ising spin-glass problems on heavy-hexagonal and square lattices. For heavy-hexagonal problems with up to three-body interactions, parameters trained on small instances and transferred to systems an order of magnitude larger improve the sampled energy distribution only up to intermediate depths, indicating a fundamental limit of parameter concentration as a transfer strategy. By extending the training itself with TN simulations on larger system sizes, we avoid local minima and obtain lower-energy samples. Analyses of entanglement growth and importance sampling show that the simulation remains classically feasible with moderate bond dimension. We find that parameter concentration also persists on square lattices, albeit at substantially higher computational cost to perform reliable sampling. Overall, our TN framework not only provides an efficient and controlled framework for benchmarking variational quantum algorithms on two-dimensional lattices, but also serves as an effective surrogate model for training variational algorithms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们采用二维张量网络（TN）变分拟设来模拟二维量子比特架构上的变分量子算法，通过将量子近似优化算法（QAOA）应用于重六边形和方形晶格上的伊辛自旋玻璃问题，展示了其精确模拟深度电路的能力。对于包含最多三体相互作用的重六边形问题，在小规模实例上训练并迁移至大一个数量级系统的参数，仅能在中等深度内改善采样能量分布，这表明参数集中化作为一种迁移策略存在根本性局限。通过使用张量网络模拟在更大系统规模上扩展训练本身，我们避免了局部极小值并获得了更低能量的样本。对纠缠增长和重要性采样的分析表明，该模拟在中等键维数下仍保持经典可行性。我们发现参数集中化在方形晶格上同样存在，尽管进行可靠采样的计算成本显著更高。总体而言，我们的张量网络框架不仅为在二维晶格上基准测试变分量子算法提供了高效且可控的框架，同时也作为训练变分算法的有效替代模型。</p></details> | 2026-04-22 | Ryo Watanabe et al. |
